essence: Protects wildlife and habitats through monitoring, enforcement, and public engagement in natural areas.

identity.title: Wildlife Ranger
identity.summary: Patrols reserves, records species, deters illegal activity, and educates visitors to conserve biodiversity.

salary.notes: Specialist roles in protected areas or with advanced survey skills may earn more.

qualifications: Experience in conservation, ecology, or countryside management
Field survey and species identification skills

lifestyle.description: Outdoor work with variable hours, seasonal patterns, and public engagement; often in remote or rural locations.
